title: Sounds X Create
description: Replaces break, fall, hit, place, and step sound ids for Create mod and Create Add-ons
body:
This resource pack uses Sounds mod sound definitions to replace the default sounds of many blocks, allowing for more immersive gameplay experience.

Compatable with most [Create Fly](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly/versions) fork versions of create on fabric.

Replaces break, fall, hit, place, and step sound ids for:

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- Acacia Window
- Andesite Alloy Block
- Andesite Bars
- Andesite Casing
- Bamboo Window
- Birch Window
- Brass Blcok
- Brass Scaffolding
- Brass Bars
- Cherry Window
- Crimson Window
- Dark Oak Window
- Deepslate Zinc ore
- Industrial Iron Window
- mangrove Window
- Metal Girder
- Oak Window
- Ornate Iron Window
- Rose Quartz lamp
- Spruce Window
- Warped Window
- Weathered Iron Window
- Zinc Block
- Zinc ore
- Raw Zinc Block

(Every Window Pane Variant too)
- Framed Glass

(Every Glass and Glass pane variant)
- Glass Door
- Glass Trapdoor

[Rechiseled Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled-create)
- All Acacia window variants
- All Birch window variants
- All Crimson window variants
- All Dark Oak window variants
- All Jungle window variants
- All Mangrove window variants
- All Oak window variants
- All Spruce window variants
- All Warped window variants

[Create:Framed](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-framed)
- Andesite Alloy Window
- Brass Window
- Copper Window
- Zinc Window
(Every Window Pane Variant too)

- All Stained Glass and Pane color variants
- All Glass Door color variants

[Create: Extra Casing](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-extra-casing)
- All Andesite casing variants
- All Brass casing variants
- All copper casing variants

[Create: Design n' Decor](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-design-n-decor)
- Iron floor
- Gold floor
- Brass floor
- Zinc floor
- Ornate grate
- Deepslate tiles
- Red deepslate tiles

[Rechiseled](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled)
- All Acacia plank variants
- All Birch plank variants
- All Jungle plank variants
- All Mangrove plank variants
- All Spruce plank variants
- All Blue ice variants
- All Cobblestone variants
- All Dark prismarine variants
- All Diamond block variants
- All Emerald block variants
- All End stone variants
- All End stone brick variants
- All Glowstone variants
- All Gold block variants
- All Iron block variants
- All lapis block variants
- All Mossy cobblestone variants
- All Obsidian variants
- All Quartz block variants
- All Redstone block variants
- All Sandstone variants
